$description: Font manifest. Canonical metadata for all self-hosted fonts in the Yogananda ecosystem. Zero external font requests — GDPR compliance (ADR-099). All fonts use SIL Open Font License (OFL).

loading-strategy.rationale: Show system font immediately, swap to custom font when loaded. Prevents invisible text during load. Acceptable flash of unstyled text is better than a blank screen on 2G.
loading-strategy.preload-rationale: Only preload the two most critical fonts (body reading + UI). Other weights/styles load on demand.

merriweather.description: Primary reading font. Warm serifs, excellent screen rendering, wide language support. The seeker reads Merriweather for hours — it must never tire the eyes.

variants.use: Body text — the primary reading experience
Emphasis, epigraph text, book titles in citations

lora.description: Display/heading accent font. Calligraphic warmth — more expressive than Merriweather at large sizes. Anchors the page with visual authority.

open-sans.description: UI/system font. Clarity and neutrality — it disappears. The UI typography should never compete with the reading typography for attention.

variants.use: Button labels, active nav items, emphasis

noto-serif-devanagari.description: Hindi reading font. Serif warmth for sustained Devanagari reading. Optical size scaled to 20px (vs 18px Latin) with 1.9 line height for shirorekha clearance. ADR-080.
noto-serif-devanagari.status: planned — fonts not yet included. Will be added when Hindi content activates (Milestone 5b).

noto-sans-devanagari.description: Hindi UI font. Sans-serif for chrome — cleaner than Serif at small UI sizes. 15px (vs 14px Latin) for optical matching.

raleway.description: YSS UI font. Geometric sans-serif from yssofindia.org. More modern than Open Sans, reflecting YSS's contemporary digital presence.
raleway.status: planned — fonts not yet included. Will be added when YSS surface activates (PRO-043).

total-weight.note: Font loading is progressive — only critical-path fonts are preloaded. Remaining fonts load as needed.
